name: ziplyne-lens
description: Open-source local-first AI coding spend dashboard by ZipLyne.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ziplyne/core build && pnpm --filter @ziplyne/api build && pnpm --filter @ziplyne/web build
scripts.desktop:serve: pnpm --filter @ziplyne/core build && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "PORT=8787 pnpm --filter @ziplyne/api dev" "PORT=5173 ZIPLYNE_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 pnpm --filter @ziplyne/web dev"
scripts.desktop:sidecar: mkdir -p apps/desktop/src-tauri/binaries && bun build apps/api/src/server.ts --compile --target bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile apps/desktop/src-tauri/binaries/ziplyne-lens-api-aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @ziplyne/core build && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @ziplyne/api dev" "pnpm --filter @ziplyne/web dev"
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @ziplyne/core test && pnpm --filter @ziplyne/api test && pnpm --filter @ziplyne/web test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ziplyne/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @ziplyne/core build && pnpm --filter @ziplyne/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @ziplyne/web typecheck
